mnemonics: PATTERSON'S 5th: Pattern Recognition, Agents, Tasks, Ethics, Reasoning, Neural Networks, Optimization.
keyPoints: Introduction to Machine Learning concepts like supervised and unsupervised learning.
Overview of Intelligent Agents and their environments.
Discussion on the ethical implications of AI systems.
commonMistakes: Confusing classification (categorical output) with regression (continuous output).
Assuming an AI agent's performance is solely based on its algorithm, ignoring the impact of its environment and percepts.
Overlooking the importance of bias and fairness in AI model training data.
